join_order.notes: scan sub with sub_fy_zone_map; filter fy==2023; build adsh_code->name_code map; cap=next_pow2(8600*2)=16384; fits L2 cache (128KB)

join_order.slot: { int32_t adsh_code; int32_t tag_code; int32_t version_code; int32_t plabel_code; }
join_order.notes: scan only IS blocks via pre_stmt_zone_map (~18 of 97 blocks); build runtime hash (adsh,tag,version)->plabel_code; cap=next_pow2(1728144*2)=4194304; 67MB runtime hash preferred over 536MB pre_atv_hash (P23); sequential build

filters.notes: pre sorted by stmt asc; IS=code0 occupies first ~18 blocks; stop scanning when block_min > is_code
high selectivity (>80%) -> fused single-pass; no selection vector needed
NULL encoded as NaN; check std::isnan(v) inline in fused scan loop

data_structures.sub_join_map: open_addressing_hash(cap=16384, slot={int32_t adsh_code, int32_t name_code}, sentinel=INT32_MIN, bounded_probing=true)
data_structures.pre_is_join_map: open_addressing_hash(cap=4194304, slot={int32_t adsh,int32_t tag,int32_t version,int32_t plabel_code}, sentinel=INT32_MIN, bounded_probing=true)
data_structures.aggregation: thread_local open_addressing_hash(cap=131072, key={int32_t name_code, int16_t stmt_code, int32_t tag_code, int32_t plabel_code}, value={int64_t sum_cents, int64_t cnt}, sentinel=name_code==INT32_MIN)

group_key.struct: struct GroupKey { int32_t name_code; int16_t stmt_code; int32_t tag_code; int32_t plabel_code; }
group_key.notes: stmt_code is constant (always IS) but included for C15 correctness

phases.build_sub_hash: sequential (86K rows, trivial with zone map)
phases.build_pre_is_hash: sequential single-pass over IS blocks (~1.73M rows, ~67MB hash, fast)
phases.scan_num: parallel morsel-driven over USD segment (~34M rows / 64 threads)
phases.aggregation: thread_local hash maps per thread (cap=131072 each), sized for FULL group cardinality not groups/nthreads (C9)
phases.merge: single merge pass after barrier, shared hash with atomic CAS or per-slot spin (P17, P20)

indexes.purpose: skip non-fy=2023 blocks during sub scan
scan only stmt=IS contiguous blocks in pre; stop when block_min > is_code
identify USD segment in num for targeted scan

output.algorithm: partial_sort or min_heap (O(n log k), k=200)
